title: Korak 7

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def merge_sort(array):
    
    middle_point = len(array) // 2
    left_part = array[:middle_point]
    right_part = array[middle_point:]
    merge_sort(left_part)
    merge_sort(right_part)
challengeFiles.seed:
def merge_sort(array):
    
    middle_point = len(array) // 2
    left_part = array[:middle_point]
    right_part = array[middle_point:]
    merge_sort(left_part)
    merge_sort(right_part)

tests.text: You should have a variable named left_array_index inside your merge_sort function
You should have a variable named right_array_index inside your merge_sort function
You should have a variable named sorted_index inside your merge_sort function

description:
Sada je vreme da sortirate i spojite liste (left_part i right_part) u originalnu listu.

Ovo možete uraditi poređenjem elemenata na obe liste i spajanjem manjeg elementa u glavnu listu. Izvršićete ovo poređenje za sve indekse u left_part i right_part.

Kreirajte tri varijable: left_array_index, right_array_index i sorted_index i postavite njihove vrednosti na 0. Ove varijable će vam pomoći da pratite svaki indeks tokom procesa sortiranja.
